handlers.name: VehicleMovementHandler
handlers.description: Handles vehicle movement AP costs and tile-based destruction effects during movement

functions.name: OnMovement
functions.purpose: Sets movement flag when vehicle begins moving

functions.name: OnTileChanged
functions.purpose: Checks for destructible environment features and removes them when vehicle passes

functions.name: OnUpdate
functions.purpose: Applies movement AP cost to actor's movement counter

functions.name: Create
functions.purpose: Factory method to instantiate handler with effect data

base_handler.name: isMoving
base_handler.description: Flag indicating vehicle is currently in motion

effect_data_at_0x58.name: movementAPCost
effect_data_at_0x58.description: Action point cost per tile moved

EnvironmentFeatureInstance.0x88: bool destructOnMove - flag for destruction on vehicle passage

handlers.name: VehicleRotationHandler
handlers.description: Manages vehicle rotation mechanics including AP costs, preview visualization, and two-click confirmation for player vehicles

functions.name: DoTurn
functions.purpose: Executes the actual rotation, subtracts AP cost, updates actor direction

functions.name: IsUsable
functions.purpose: Checks if vehicle can rotate (not locked, has sufficient AP)

functions.name: OnCancel
functions.purpose: Clears pending rotation state and hides visualizer

functions.name: OnMissionStarted
functions.purpose: Initializes handler state, configures AI skill ranges

functions.name: OnUse
functions.signature: void OnUse(VehicleRotationHandler this, Actor actor, BaseTile targetTile)
functions.purpose: Main entry point - handles player two-click confirmation or AI direct rotation

functions.name: OnVerifyTarget
functions.signature: bool OnVerifyTarget(VehicleRotationHandler this, BaseTile fromTile, BaseTile targetTile)
functions.purpose: Validates target tile and checks AP requirements

functions.name: Create
functions.purpose: Factory method to instantiate handler with effect data

base_handler.name: previewCost
base_handler.description: Cached AP cost for UI preview display

base_handler.name: pendingTarget
base_handler.description: Stored target tile for two-click rotation confirmation

Actor.0xB0: int32 direction - Direction enum (0-7, 8 compass directions)

handlers.name: ModularVehicleSkillHandler
handlers.description: Controls modular vehicle weapon skill availability based on equipped weapon slot configuration

functions.name: OnMissionStarted
functions.purpose: Initializes skill based on equipped weapon count matching slot requirements

functions.name: Create
functions.purpose: Factory method to instantiate handler with effect data

effect_data_at_0x58.name: weaponSlotIndex
effect_data_at_0x58.description: Weapon slot configuration: 0=single weapon, 1=dual weapon required

ModularVehicleWeaponTemplate.class_id: Used for type checking weapon items

key_discoveries.finding: All three handlers inherit from SkillEventHandler base class with consistent field layout: skill ptr at 0x10, effectData ptr at 0x18
Effect data classes (ScriptableObjects) use offset 0x58 as the first custom field after BaseEffect base class fields (0x00-0x57)
VehicleMovementHandler applies AP cost via Actor.tilesMovedThisTurn (offset 0xD4) accumulator pattern
VehicleRotationHandler implements two-click confirmation for player-controlled vehicles using pendingTarget (0x28) state
Vehicle rotation can be disabled via VehicleProperties.flags bit 2 at offset 0xEC
ModularVehicleSkillHandler enables/disables skills based on matching equipped weapon count to slot index configuration
VehicleMovementHandler.OnTileChanged removes destructible environment features (destructOnMove flag at feature_tile+0x88)
VehicleRotationHandler integrates with VehicleRotationVisualizer and UITactical for preview cost display
VehicleRotationHandler branches on Entity.IsPlayerControlled() - AI gets direct DoTurn, player gets two-click confirmation
ModularVehicleWeaponTemplate type checking uses IL2CPP runtime type comparison via class metadata at offset 0x130

cross_references.Actor: Core entity class with GetTurningCost(), SetActionPoints(), TurnTo() methods
